name: Trade Balance Statistics by Top 20 Countries in FY2017

columns.title: partner_country_en
columns.description: The name of the trade partner country in English.

columns.title: partner_country_kh
columns.description: The name of the trade partner country in Khmer, supporting bilingual reporting.

columns.title: export_value_thousand_usd
columns.description: Total export value to the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Thousand US Dollars.

columns.title: import_value_thousand_usd
columns.description: Total import value from the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Total export value to the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Thousand US Dollars.

columns.title: coverage_percent
columns.description: Export coverage ratio, calculated as exports divided by imports, multiplied by 100. This indicator measures the extent to which export earnings cover import expenditures with the partner country.

columns.title: balance_thousand_usd
columns.description: Net trade balance with the partner country for Fiscal Year, calculated as export value minus import value. Positive values indicate a trade surplus; negative values indicate a trade deficit.

columns.title: volume_thousand_usd
columns.description: Total bilateral trade volume with the respective partner country, calculated as export plus import. This reflects the overall trade activity between Cambodia and the partner country.

columns.description: The highest-level revenue indicator in Khmer. It include ចំណូលចរន្ត, ចំណូលមូលធន, វិនិយោគសាធារណៈដោយហិរញ្ញប្បទានក្រៅប្រទេស, and បញ្ញើររដ្ឋាភិបាល.

columns.description: The sub_indicator level of revenue within main revenue indicator in English. It includes, Domestic Capital​ Revenue, Grant financing, Capital revenue for projects by foreign financing, Revenue from development partner's budgetary support fund, and Government deposits.

columns.title: sub_revenue_indicator_kh
columns.description: The sub_indicator level of revenue within main revenue indicator in Khmer. It includes, ចំណូលមូលធនក្នុងស្រុក, ហិរញ្ញប្បទានឥតសំណង, ចំណូលមូលធនសម្រាប់គម្រោងដោយហិរញ្ញប្បទានក្រៅប្រទេស, ចំណូលមូលនិធិទ្រទ្រង់ថវិការហិរញ្ញប្បទានដោយដៃគូរអភិវឌ្ឍ and បញ្ញើររដ្ឋាភិបាល.

columns.description: The fiscal year to which the budget or expenditure data corresponds (format: YYYY).

columns.title: main_expenditure_indicator_en
columns.description: The highest-level classification of the national expenditure budget indicator in English language. It includes, Current Expenditure, and Capital Expenditure.

columns.title: main_expenditure_indicator_kh
columns.description: The highest-level classification of the national expenditure budget indicator in Khmer language. It includes, ចំណាយចរន្ត and ចំណាយមូលធន.

columns.title: sub_expenditure_indicator_en
columns.description: The sub-national expenditure indicator level within national expenditure budget indicator level 1 in English language. It includes, Domestically financed public investment, and Loan Payment.

columns.title: sub_expenditure_indicator_kh
columns.description: The sub-national expenditure indicator level within national expenditure budget indicator level 1 in Khmer language. It includes, វិនិយោគសាធារណៈដោយហិរញ្ញប្បទានក្នុងស្រុក and ការទូទាត់ការខ្ចី.

columns.title: budget_law_amount
columns.description: The planned or allocated amount in the budget law. Its unit measurement is million riels.

columns.title: implement_amount
columns.description: The executed amount after execution that was disbursed in budget settlement law. Its unit measurement is million riels.

columns.title: deficit_surplus
columns.description: The difference between the implemented amount with budget law amount, indicating either a deficit or surplus. Its unit measurement is million riels. If implement > budget law then it will be surplus and if budget law > implement then it will be deficit.

columns.title: remarks
columns.description: Any additional notes or explanations regarding the budget or expenditure item.

name: Budget of in Brief of National Level of Budget Law, FY1998 - FY2025

columns.title: year
columns.description: Year of Budget Law or Fiscal Year

columns.title: indicator_level_1
columns.description: Level 1 indicators: Revenue (1), Expenditure (2), Surplus of Current Budget (3), Deficit of Budget (4), Sources of Financing Deficit (5).

columns.title: indicator_level_2
columns.description: Level 2 subclasses under Level 1: Current Revenue (1.1), Capital Revenue (1.2), Current Expenditure (2.1), Capital Expenditure (2.2), External Financing (5.1), Domestic Financing (5.2).

columns.title: indicator_level_3
columns.description: Level 3 subclasses under Level 2: Tax Revenue (1.1.1), Non-Tax Revenue (1.1.2), Domestically Financed Public Investment (2.2.1), Foreign-Financed Public Investment (2.2.2), Borrowings (5.1.3), Issuance of Government Securities (5.2.2).

columns.title: indicator_level_4
columns.description: Level 4 subclasses under Level 3: National Budget (2.2.1.1), Budget Support Funds by Development Partners (2.2.1.2).

columns.title: indicator_level_5
columns.description: Level 5 subclasses under Level 4: Direct Investment Projects (2.2.1.1.1), Investment Contributions (2.2.1.1.2).

columns.title: budget_amount_million_khr
columns.description: Amount in million KHR for the specified indicator level; higher-level totals include all their sub-levels.

name: Cambodia Standard Classification of Occupations

columns.title: Chapter
columns.description: The highest level in the classification, where occupations are grouped according to broad sectors or industries of the economy.

columns.title: Devision
columns.description: A subdivision within a chapter, representing more specific groupings of related occupations based on their functional or sectoral characteristics.

columns.title: Group
columns.description: Further subdivisions within a division, categorizing occupations that share similar job functions or roles.

columns.title: Class
columns.description: A more specific categorization within a group, detailing narrower occupations or professional categories based on common characteristics or skills.

columns.title: Sub-Class
columns.description: The most detailed level of the classification, representing specialized or distinct roles within a particular class of occupations.

columns.title: Khmer Description
columns.description: This provides detailed descriptions of each occupation in the Cambodian language (Khmer), helping to ensure that the CSCO is accessible and relevant to local users and stakeholders, and reflects the unique aspects of the Cambodian labor market.

columns.description: A number assigned to each country on the list to help identify it easily

columns.title: Country
columns.description: The name of the country whose citizens can visit Cambodia without needing a visa, depending on their passport type

columns.title: Diplomatic(Days)
columns.description: he number of days citizens with a diplomatic passport from the listed country can stay in Cambodia without a visa (e.g., 14 days for Brunei, 90 days for Lao P.D.R). If blank, no special exemption applies.

columns.title: Official(Days)
columns.description: The number of days citizens with an official passport from the listed country can stay in Cambodia without a visa (e.g., 30 days for Malaysia). If blank, no special exemption applies.

columns.title: Special(Days)
columns.description: The number of days citizens with a special passport from the listed country can stay in Cambodia without a visa. If blank, no special exemption applies (rarely used for most visitors).

columns.title: Ordinary(Days)
columns.description: The number of days citizens with an ordinary (regular) passport from the listed country can stay in Cambodia without a visa for tourism (e.g., 30 days for Vietnam, 14 days for Thailand). If blank, a visa is required.

name: International Standard Industrial Classification of all Economic(ISIC) rev4

columns.title: Section
columns.description: The highest-level classification of economic activity, typically represented by a letter (e.g., T, U) or a code (e.g., 9603). It groups broad sectors of economic activities (e.g., "Activities of households", "Extraterritorial organizations").

columns.title: Division
columns.description: A two-digit code representing a subdivision of the section. It narrows down the classification into more specific activity categories.

columns.title: Group
columns.description: A three-digit code that provides a finer breakdown of economic activity within each division.

columns.title: Class
columns.description: A four-digit code representing the most detailed level of classification. It defines the specific economic activity.

columns.title: Description
columns.description: A textual explanation of the economic activity identified by the corresponding section/division/group/class codes.

name: Trade Balance Statistics by Top 20 Countries in FY2025

columns.title: partner_country_en
columns.description: The name of the trade partner country in English.

columns.title: partner_country_kh
columns.description: The name of the trade partner country in Khmer, supporting bilingual reporting.

columns.title: export_value_thousand_usd
columns.description: Total export value to the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Thousand US Dollars.

columns.title: import_value_thousand_usd
columns.description: Total import value from the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Total export value to the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Thousand US Dollars.

columns.title: coverage_percent
columns.description: Export coverage ratio, calculated as exports divided by imports, multiplied by 100. This indicator measures the extent to which export earnings cover import expenditures with the partner country.

columns.title: balance_thousand_usd
columns.description: Net trade balance with the partner country for Fiscal Year, calculated as export value minus import value. Positive values indicate a trade surplus; negative values indicate a trade deficit.

columns.title: volume_thousand_usd
columns.description: Total bilateral trade volume with the respective partner country, calculated as export plus import. This reflects the overall trade activity between Cambodia and the partner country.

name: Import Statistics by the Top 20 Countries in FY2025

columns.title: partner_country_en
columns.description: The name of the import partner country in English. This identifies the main countries from which Cambodia imported goods during the Fiscal Year.

columns.title: partner_country_kh
columns.description: The name of the import partner country in Khmer, supporting bilingual reporting and domestic use.

columns.title: import_value
columns.description: Total import value from the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Thousand US Dollars (Thousand US$). This represents the aggregated annual value of goods imported into Cambodia from each listed country.

name: Weighted Average Rate on Outstanding Amount​ of Interest rate on deposit and loans in USD 2024

columns.title: Date
columns.description: Represents a standardized way to express calendar dates, where yyyy denote the year format, mm denote the month format, and dd denote the date

columns.title: Demand_Deposits
columns.description: The average interest rate for USD demand deposits, which are accounts where money can be withdrawn anytime without notice (e.g., 0.89% in January 2024).

columns.title: Saving_Deposits
columns.description: The average interest rate for USD savings accounts, where money is saved but can still be accessed (e.g., 0.80% in January 2024).

columns.title: Term_Deposits
columns.description: The average interest rate for USD term deposits, where money is saved for a fixed period, often with higher rates (e.g., 6.40% in January 2024).

columns.title: Other_Deposits
columns.description: The average interest rate for other types of USD deposits not covered by demand, savings, or term categories (e.g., 4.72% in January 2024).

columns.title: Overdraft(Loans)
columns.description: The average interest rate charged on USD overdraft loans, which cover extra withdrawals beyond an account’s balance (e.g., 7.68% in January 2024).

columns.title: Credit_Card(Loans)
columns.description: The average interest rate charged on USD credit card balances, typically higher due to risk (e.g., 16.07% in January 2024).

columns.title: Term_Loans
columns.description: The average interest rate for USD term loans, which are loans repaid over a fixed period (e.g., 9.75% in January 2024).

columns.title: Other_Loans
columns.description: The average interest rate for other types of USD loans not covered by overdraft, credit card, or term loans (e.g., 7.46% in January 2024).

name: Trade Balance Statistics by Top 20 Countries in FY2024

columns.title: partner_country_en
columns.description: The name of the trade partner country in English.

columns.title: partner_country_kh
columns.description: The name of the trade partner country in Khmer, supporting bilingual reporting.

columns.title: export_value_thousand_usd
columns.description: Total export value to the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Thousand US Dollars.

columns.title: import_value_thousand_usd
columns.description: Total import value from the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Total export value to the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Thousand US Dollars.

columns.title: coverage_percent
columns.description: Export coverage ratio, calculated as exports divided by imports, multiplied by 100. This indicator measures the extent to which export earnings cover import expenditures with the partner country.

columns.title: balance_thousand_usd
columns.description: Net trade balance with the partner country for Fiscal Year, calculated as export value minus import value. Positive values indicate a trade surplus; negative values indicate a trade deficit.

columns.title: volume_thousand_usd
columns.description: Total bilateral trade volume with the respective partner country, calculated as export plus import. This reflects the overall trade activity between Cambodia and the partner country.

name: Import Statistics by the Top 20 Countries in FY2024

columns.title: partner_country_en
columns.description: The name of the import partner country in English. This identifies the main countries from which Cambodia imported goods during the Fiscal Year.

columns.title: partner_country_kh
columns.description: The name of the import partner country in Khmer, supporting bilingual reporting and domestic use.

columns.title: import_value
columns.description: Total import value from the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Thousand US Dollars (Thousand US$). This represents the aggregated annual value of goods imported into Cambodia from each listed country.

name: Forest area (% of land area) - Cambodia between 1990 to 2022

columns.title: Year
columns.description: The calendar year in which the indicator value was recorded. Format: YYYY (e.g., 1990).

columns.title: country code
columns.description: The ISO 3-letter country code. For Cambodia, this is KHM

columns.title: country name
columns.description: The full name of the country. In this dataset, it is always "Cambodia".

columns.title: indicator code
columns.description: A unique code identifying the specific indicator, in this case AG.LND.FRST.ZS, which refers to Forest area (% of land area).

columns.title: indicator name
columns.description: A human-readable label for the indicator. For this dataset: Forest area (% of land area), which measures the proportion of land covered by forest.

columns.title: Value
columns.description: The numerical value of the indicator for the specified year and country. Expressed as a percentage of total land area (e.g., 62.34 means 62.34% of Cambodia’s land area was forested in that year).

name: Cambodia's Foreign Direct Investment, Net Inflows (% of GDP) between 1975-2023

columns.title: Year

columns.title: country code
columns.description: The 3-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code representing the country. For Cambodia, this is KHM.

columns.title: country name
columns.description: The full name of the country: Cambodia.

columns.title: indicator code
columns.description: The World Bank indicator code: BX.KLT.DINV.WD.GD.ZS. It stands for Foreign direct investment, net inflows (% of GDP).

columns.title: indicator name
columns.description: A readable name of the indicator: Foreign direct investment, net inflows (% of GDP). It measures net FDI inflows expressed as a share of GDP.

columns.title: Value
columns.description: The FDI net inflows as a percentage of GDP. For example, 0.036042 means that 0.036% of Cambodia's GDP in 1975 came from net FDI inflows. None indicates missing data for that year.

name: Cambodia's GDP (current US$) between 1975 to 2023

columns.description: The full name of the country. Here, it is "Cambodia".

columns.title: indicator code
columns.description: The World Bank indicator code that uniquely identifies the type of data. NY.GDP.MKTP.CD stands for GDP (current US$).

columns.title: indicator name
columns.description: The human-readable name of the indicator. In this case, GDP (current US$), which refers to the gross domestic product at market prices measured in current US dollars (not adjusted for inflation).

name: Cambodia International Trade Summary 2016–2025

columns.title: Ref_Year
columns.description: The reference year of the reported trade statistics (from 2016 to 2025).

columns.title: Domestic_Export_Value
columns.description: The total value of goods produced domestically in Cambodia and exported abroad during the year, measured in USD.

columns.title: Re_Export_Value
columns.description: The total value of imported goods that were exported again without significant processing in Cambodia, measured in USD.

columns.title: Export_Value
columns.description: The total export value for the year, calculated as: Domestic Export Value + Re-Export Value, measured in USD

columns.title: Import_Value
columns.description: The total value of all goods imported into Cambodia during the year, measured in USD.

columns.title: Total_trade_value
columns.description: The sum of total exports and total imports for the year, representing Cambodia’s overall trade volume: Export Value + Import Value, measured in USD.

columns.title: Balance
columns.description: The trade balance for the year, calculated as: Export Value − Import Value, measured in USD. A positive value indicates a trade surplus, while a negative value indicates a trade deficit.

name: Trade Balance Statistics by Top 20 Countries in FY2023

columns.title: partner_country_en
columns.description: The name of the trade partner country in English.

columns.title: partner_country_kh
columns.description: The name of the trade partner country in Khmer, supporting bilingual reporting.

columns.title: export_value_thousand_usd
columns.description: Total export value to the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Thousand US Dollars.

columns.title: import_value_thousand_usd
columns.description: Total import value from the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Total export value to the respective partner country for Fiscal Year, measured in Thousand US Dollars.

columns.title: coverage_percent
columns.description: Export coverage ratio, calculated as exports divided by imports, multiplied by 100. This indicator measures the extent to which export earnings cover import expenditures with the partner country.

columns.title: balance_thousand_usd
columns.description: Net trade balance with the partner country for Fiscal Year, calculated as export value minus import value. Positive values indicate a trade surplus; negative values indicate a trade deficit.

columns.title: volume_thousand_usd
columns.description: Total bilateral trade volume with the respective partner country, calculated as export plus import. This reflects the overall trade activity between Cambodia and the partner country.

name: Cambodia Gross Domestic Product (GDP) at Current prices from 2005-2022

columns.title: year
columns.description: The year of the data record (e.g., 2005), representing the year for which the Gross Domestic Product (GDP) data of Cambodia is provided at current prices.

columns.title: gdp_in_billion_khr
columns.description: The GDP of Cambodia in billion Khmer Riel (KHR) at current prices for the given year, reflecting the total economic output in the national currency.

columns.title: gdp_in_million_usd
columns.description: The GDP of Cambodia in million US Dollars (USD) at current prices for the given year, converted from KHR to USD based on the exchange rate of that year.

columns.title: gdp_growth_rate_percentage
columns.description: The annual percentage growth rate of Cambodia's GDP at current prices compared to the previous year, indicating the rate of economic expansion or contraction.

columns.title: gdp_per_capita_in_million_khr
columns.description: The GDP per capita in million Khmer Riel (KHR) for the given year, calculated by dividing the total GDP in KHR by the population, representing the average economic output per person.

columns.title: gdp_per_capita_in_usd
columns.description: The GDP per capita in US Dollars (USD) for the given year, calculated by dividing the total GDP in USD by the population, reflecting the average economic output per person in USD.

name: Statistic by Contract Savings, FY2023

columns.title: procurement subject
columns.description: The category or type of procurement item or service. Typical entries include: Goods, Construction, Services, and Consulting Services.

columns.title: guaranteed cost (million riels)
columns.description: The initial or budgeted amount allocated or guaranteed for the procurement project, expressed in million Cambodian Riels (KHR).

columns.title: contract price (million riels)
columns.description: The actual contracted price agreed upon with suppliers or contractors, also in million Riels.

columns.title: savings (million riels)
columns.description: The difference between the guaranteed cost and the final contract price, representing cost savings, in million Riels. This shows how much was saved during the procurement process.

name: Geographical coordinates of Tboung Khmum Provice

columns.title: Zip Code
columns.description: A unique code identifying each location in Tboung Khmum Province (e.g., 25 for the province, 2501 for a district, 250101 for a commune, 25010101 for a village), following a hierarchical structure for administrative organization.

columns.title: Name
columns.description: The name of the location in English (e.g., "Tboung Khmum" for the province, "Dambae" for a district, "Chong Cheach" for a commune, "Kouk Sralau" for a village), specifying the place from province to village level.

columns.title: Longtitude
columns.description: The east-west position of the location in degrees, minutes, and seconds (e.g., "E105° 47' 00.006"""), providing the longitude coordinate for mapping and spatial reference.

columns.title: Latitude
columns.description: The north-south position of the location in degrees, minutes, and seconds (e.g., "N11° 53' 51.312"""), providing the latitude coordinate for mapping and spatial reference.

columns.title: Type of Location
columns.description: The administrative level of the location (e.g., Province, District, Commune, Village), indicating the hierarchical category of the place within Tboung Khmum Province.

name: Geographical coordinates of Takeo Provice

columns.title: Zip Code
columns.description: A unique code identifying each location in Takeo Province (e.g., 21 for the province, 210101 for a commune, 21010101 for a village), following a hierarchical structure for administrative organization.

columns.title: Name
columns.description: The name of the location in English (e.g., "Takeo" for the province, "Angkor Borei" for a district), specifying the place from province to village level.

columns.title: Longtitude
columns.description: The east-west position of the location in degrees, minutes, and seconds (e.g., "E104° 47' 01.722"""), providing the longitude coordinate for mapping and spatial reference.

columns.title: Latitude
columns.description: The north-south position of the location in degrees, minutes, and seconds (e.g., "N10° 59' 26.734"""), providing the latitude coordinate for mapping and spatial reference.

columns.title: Type of Location
columns.description: The administrative level of the location (e.g., Province, District, Commune, Village), indicating the hierarchical category of the place within Takeo Province.

name: Geographical coordinates of Svay Rieng Provice

columns.title: Zip Code
columns.description: A unique code identifying each location in Svay Rieng Province (e.g., 20 for the province, 2001 for a district, 20010301 for a village), following a hierarchical structure for administrative organization.

columns.title: Name
columns.description: The name of the location in English (e.g., "Svay Rieng" for the province, "Chantrea" for a district), specifying the place from province to village level.

columns.title: Longtitude
columns.description: The east-west position of the location in degrees, minutes, and seconds (e.g., "E105° 48' 17.975"""), providing the longitude coordinate for mapping and spatial reference.

columns.title: Latitude
columns.description: The north-south position of the location in degrees, minutes, and seconds (e.g., "N11° 04' 55.350"""), providing the latitude coordinate for mapping and spatial reference.

columns.title: Type of Location
columns.description: The administrative level of the location (e.g., Province, District, Commune, Village), indicating the hierarchical category of the place within Svay Rieng Province.

name: Geographical coordinates of Stung Treng Province

columns.title: Zip Code
columns.description: A numeric identifier assigned to the geographic location. In Cambodia, this typically refers to postal codes or administrative codes.

columns.title: Name
columns.description: The name of the location, such as a province or district (e.g., "STUNG TRENG", "Sesan").

columns.title: Longtitude
columns.description: The east-west geographic coordinate in degrees, minutes, and seconds (e.g., E105° 58' 10.062). Note: Should be corrected to "longitude".

columns.title: Latitude
columns.description: The north-south geographic coordinate in degrees, minutes, and seconds (e.g., N13° 31' 21.940").

name: Cambodia Inflation from 2005 to 2025

columns.title: Date
columns.description: The date for the reported data (in dd/mm/yyyy format).

columns.title: CPI_all_item
columns.description: The Consumer Price Index (CPI) for all items. This reflects the general price level of a basket of goods and services, measured in Index Points

columns.title: MoM_Change_CPI_all_item
columns.description: Month-over-Month change in the CPI. Indicates how much the CPI has changed from the previous month, measured in Percentage (%).

columns.title: YoY_Change_CPI_all_item
columns.description: Year-over-Year change in the CPI. Indicates the annual inflation rate compared to the same month last year, measured in Percentage (%).

columns.title: CPI_3_Month_Moving_Avg
columns.description: Three-month moving average of the CPI Index. Indicates the short-term price trend by smoothing out monthly spikes, measured in Index Points.

columns.title: CPI_12_Month_Moving_Avg
columns.description: Twelve-month moving average of the CPI Index. Indicates the long-term direction of price levels over a full year, measured in Index Points.

columns.title: YoY_3_Month_Avg
columns.description: Three-month moving average of the YoY inflation rate. Indicates recent inflation momentum over the last quarter, measured in Percentage (%).

columns.title: YoY_12_Month_Avg
columns.description: Twelve-month moving average of the YoY inflation rate. Indicates the average annual inflation trend for the year, measured in Percentage (%).

columns.title: no_school
columns.description: Total number of schools (public pre-schools, primary, and secondary) in the province

columns.title: dis_school
columns.description: Number of disadvantaged schools, as defined by having poor infrastructure and no water/sanitation

columns.title: no_class
columns.description: Total number of classes in the schools.

columns.title: clas_pagod
columns.description: Number of classes held in pagoda compounds (but the school itself is not fully in a pagoda)

columns.title: t_enrol
columns.description: Total number of students enrolled in the schools

columns.title: enrol_girl
columns.description: Total number of female students enrolled in the schools.

columns.title: t_repeat
columns.description: Total number of repeaters (students repeating the same grade)

columns.title: repeat_gir
columns.description: Number of female repeaters

columns.title: t_teacher
columns.description: Total number of teaching staff: includes classroom teachers, some principals, librarians, etc.

columns.title: teacher_f
columns.description: Total number of female teaching staff

columns.title: t_nonteach
columns.description: Total number of non-teaching staff: includes admin, accountants, drivers, cooks, etc.

columns.title: nonteach_f
columns.description: Total number of female non-teaching staff

columns.title: t_staff
columns.description: Total school staff: sum of teaching + non-teaching staff

columns.title: staff_f
columns.description: Total female staff: female teachers + female non-teaching staff

name: Cambodia Villages List 2025

columns.title: province_code
columns.description: A unique indentification number of each province by various name-based. It is a top node that having multiple District as sub-node where each District having Commune as sub-node and Commune having Village as sub-node. It is a top level of geographical administrative location in Cambodia.

columns.title: district_code
columns.description: A unique identification code of each district by various name-based. It is a sub-node of province. One District has many Communes. It is a second top level of geographical administrative location in Cambodia.

columns.title: commune_code
columns.description: A unique identification code of each commune by various name-based. It is a sub-node of District. One Commune has many Villages. It is a three top level of geographical administrative location in Cambodia.

columns.title: village_code
columns.description: A unique identification number of each village by various name, used to track and organize data in order sequentially.

columns.title: village_kh
columns.description: The name of the villages that is written in Khmer Language.

columns.title: village_en
columns.description: The English Name or Latin Name of the villages that was translated from the Name_km which making it easier for those who are not Cambodian to understand.
